title: Add Playwright + axe-core devDeps and test:e2e scripts; regenerate lockfile
acceptance_criteria: package.json devDependencies includes "@playwright/test": "1.59.1" EXACT (no caret/tilde) — must equal resolved playwright@1.59.1
package.json devDependencies includes @axe-core/playwright at a version compatible with @playwright/test 1.59.1 (exact or caret acceptable)
package.json scripts adds "test:e2e": "playwright test" and "test:e2e:ui": "playwright test --ui"; no other scripts changed
package-lock.json regenerated via npm so npm ci is deterministic; lockfileVersion remains 3; yarn.lock untouched
npm run test and npm run lint still pass (no script regressions)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
